steps.title: Identify the position between noun and clause
steps.content: The blank comes between a term (noun) and that this specimen serves... (dependent clause)—a position where a participle is needed to connect them.

steps.title: Apply the participle rule
steps.content:
Use a participle to modify a noun. Indicating correctly functions as a present participle modifying term and introducing the dependent clause: a term indicating that this specimen serves as the basis... Options A and B use finite verbs where a participle is required, and option C uses a past participle creating awkward meaning.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
